case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. SANDEE NODA

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NODA, SANDEE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-22-2021
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-17-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-16-2021 CONTINUED TO JAN-11-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NODA, SANDEE $6,868.52 PRINCIPAL, $292.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,160.52, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-17-2021 CONTINUED TO NOV-16-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-11-2022 CONTINUED TO MAR-15-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
